name: plex
title: Plex Media Server
description: Plex Media Server for organizing and streaming your personal media collection

variables.name: PLEX_CLAIM
variables.label: Plex Claim Token
variables.description: Claim token from https://plex.tv/claim (valid for 4 minutes)

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Plex web interface

variables.name: MEDIA_PATH
variables.label: Media Path
variables.description: Host path to your media library (movies, TV shows, music)
